LanguageData.RK_Scenario_Bandits.label: Ratkin Bandit Gang
LanguageData.RK_Scenario_Bandits.description: Survivors of the civil war who turned into pillagers to stay alive. We've crossed the line, murdering our own kin. Now, as we hide among the wreckage of a crashed ship, we wonder... is there any redemption for us, or are we forever cursed?
LanguageData.RK_Scenario_Bandits.scenario.summary: A group of Ratkin bandits who crossed the line to survive the horrors of the civil war.
